status_detail: Pilot project for injecting green hydrogen into the natural gas grid by OGF (Danske Gas Distributionsselskab). 1 MW PEM electrolyzer feeding H2 into the Danish gas grid at up to 10% blend. Demonstrating grid injection for power-to-grid applications. Part of Denmark's gas sector decarbonization strategy.

data_management.narrative_summary: OGF (Danske Gas Distributionsselskab) is operating a 1 MW PEM electrolysis pilot that injects green hydrogen into the Danish natural gas grid at up to 10% blend. The project demonstrates the technical feasibility of hydrogen grid injection for power-to-grid applications, providing a large-scale offtake pathway for hydrogen production that doesn't require dedicated industrial offtakers. Denmark is a leader in hydrogen grid injection pilots, supporting the transition of gas infrastructure for the hydrogen economy.

power.grid_connection_detail: Grid-connected pilot with hydrogen injection into Danish natural gas grid

offtake.offtaker_name: Danish natural gas grid (up to 10% blend)

sources.title: OGF hydrogen grid injection pilot — Denmark's gas grid H2 blending demonstration
sources.author: OGF / Energinet
